funding.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
funding.rawTextSnippet: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

dailyBrief: In a significant shift within the AI landscape, Anthropic has overtaken OpenAI to become the most valuable AI startup, reflecting a growing competition in the sector that could reshape investment strategies. Meanwhile, SoftBank announced plans to invest up to €75 billion in French data centers, highlighting a robust demand for infrastructure to support AI advancements. This surge in data center development is also contributing to a jobs boom for blue-collar workers, indicating a broader economic impact beyond tech. Additionally, SpaceX's dual AI compute initiatives reveal a split in revenue generation, emphasizing the need for businesses to strategically assess their AI investments for profitability.
